caption: A young woman with her hair in double buns stands in bright sunlight on a sidewalk in front of a closed storefront with a red and yellow sign, wearing a black bralette, black pants, and an open white short-sleeved shirt. The scene transforms into a figure with a white, faceted geometric appearance and hair styled in two buns stands in bright sunlight next to a white building, wearing a white short-sleeved shirt and loose trousers.

A man wearing a tan baseball cap, sunglasses, a pink patterned headscarf, a brown t-shirt over a white long-sleeved shirt, black pants, and white sneakers sits on a concrete ledge outdoors in bright sunlight next to a small potted plant. The scene transforms into a white, low-poly geometric sculpture of a seated person wearing a cap and long-sleeved clothing rests on a concrete ledge outdoors under bright sunlight.

Two men wearing black suits, white shirts, black ties, and sunglasses stand back-to-back holding silver handguns under a bright overhead spotlight in a dark studio. The scene transforms into two monochromatic white figures of men in suits and sunglasses stand back-to-back holding handguns in a minimalist grey studio under soft overhead lighting.

A young woman with her hair styled in space buns stands in bright sunlight on a sidewalk in front of a closed metal shutter and a red and yellow sign, wearing a black bralette, black pants, and an open white short-sleeved shirt. The scene transforms into a white, geometrically faceted figure of a person with hair styled in two buns and wearing a white open shirt, crop top, and pants stands on a concrete sidewalk next to a white building under bright, direct sunlight.

Under bright convenience store lighting, a smiling woman in a dark jumpsuit holds a fan of cash next to a man in a black hoodie covering his face, while a store clerk in a red shirt smiles from behind the counter. The scene transforms into several light-blue, textured figures of people stand in an indoor office setting under a tiled ceiling with fluorescent lights.

A young woman wearing a green headscarf, sunglasses, a brown patterned cardigan, a dark satin skirt, and green socks sits with her legs crossed at an outdoor cafe table on a city sidewalk. The scene transforms into a faceted, white geometric figure sits at a round outdoor table with a cup, positioned in a monochromatic street scene featuring bare trees and parked cars under soft, diffused light.

A young woman with dark curly hair and glossy lips looks to the side while wearing a bright red hooded jacket with white text, set against a solid grey background with soft lighting. The scene transforms into a monochromatic white figure of a person with curly hair, blank eyes, and a faceted face wears a hooded jacket against a dark background under soft lighting.
